hero_eyebrow: One line of code between your scripts and your Discord DM
hero_sub: Relay is a minimal notification relay: an API key, an endpoint, a private message delivered to Discord. No account creation needed, no server setup. Easily receive alerts from your own applications, scripts, or code directly on Discord.
feat1_desc: No passwords to manage. Your identity is your Discord account — Relay retrieves your ID, username, and avatar, nothing more.
feat2_desc: Generate a pk_... key from the dashboard and send a POST /api/send request from any programming language.
feat3_desc: Every notification sent, whether successful or failed, remains accessible in your dashboard.
dash_alert_text: Copy it now: it will never be displayed in plain text again.
dash_no_keys: No keys yet. Generate one to start sending notifications.
dash_danger_desc: Permanently deletes your account, your API keys, and your entire notification history. This action cannot be undone.
dash_confirm_label: Type SUPPRIMER (French for DELETE) to confirm
admin_no_data: No data for this period yet.
admin_setting_max_keys: Max active API keys per user
docs_intro: Relay exposes a single public endpoint. Authenticate using the key generated in your dashboard, send a message, and it arrives directly in your Discord DMs.
param_api_key_desc: API key generated from the dashboard (prefix pk_).
param_message_desc: Message content, up to 2000 characters (Discord limit).
resp_400: Invalid request (missing field, message too long).
resp_502: The bot could not deliver the DM (user unreachable).
docs_tip1: A key revoked from the dashboard stops working immediately.
docs_tip2: Keep your keys out of public repositories: treat them like a password.
footer_tagline: Relay — a notification relay, not a social network.
confirm_revoke_key: Revoke this key? It will stop working immediately.
confirm_delete_account: Final confirmation: this will permanently delete your account and all your data. Continue?
cgu_intro: Last updated: July 22, 2026. By using Relay, you agree to these terms of service.
cgu_s1_text: Relay is a notification relay platform allowing users to send direct messages (DMs) to their own Discord account from third-party applications, scripts, or services via a REST HTTP API.
cgu_s2_text: Access to the Relay dashboard is performed exclusively through OAuth2 authentication via the Discord platform (permission scope: identify). Relay never asks for or stores your Discord credentials or passwords.
cgu_s3_li1: Generation and hashing: When an API key (prefixed with pk_) is created, it is displayed in plain text only once. Relay only stores a secure hash of the key in the database (bcrypt hashing).
cgu_s3_li2: Responsibility: You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your API keys. Any request made with your API key is deemed to originate from you.
cgu_s3_li3: Revocation: You can revoke active API keys at any time from your dashboard. A revoked key cannot be reactivated.
cgu_s4_title: 4. API Usage Rules and Technical Limits
cgu_s4_intro: Using the sending endpoint (/api/send) is subject to the following technical constraints:
cgu_s4_li1: Message length: Maximum message size is limited to 2,000 characters (in accordance with Discord limits).
cgu_s4_li2: Rate Limiting: A request quota per minute per key / IP address is applied to maintain platform stability and prevent abuse.
cgu_s4_li3: Deliverability: To receive notifications, you must share at least one server with Relay's Discord bot or have interacted with it, and allow direct messages.
cgu_s5_intro: The following are strictly prohibited under penalty of immediate account suspension or termination:
cgu_s5_li1: Sending malicious activities, spam, phishing, or illegal content via notifications.
cgu_s5_li2: Attempting to bypass rate limits or API security mechanisms.
cgu_s5_li3: Using the service for unsolicited bulk messaging to third parties (Relay is a personal notification tool, not a mass distribution network).
cgu_s5_li4: Any action violating the Discord Terms of Service.
cgu_s6_text: The Relay service is provided "AS IS" and "as available". Relay does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. Relay shall not be held liable for failure to deliver a notification due to Discord server outages, restrictions imposed by Discord, user blocking the bot, or network interruptions.
cgu_s7_li1: Collected data: Discord ID (discord_id), username, avatar, API key metadata, and notification history (timestamp, delivery status, and content).
cgu_s7_li2: Right to erasure: You can permanently delete your account and all data at any time directly from the "Danger zone" in your Dashboard. This action immediately and irreversibly deletes your account, API keys, and notification history.
cgu_s8_text: Relay reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use of the service following modifications constitutes unreserved acceptance of the updated terms.
cgu_s9_text: These terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute and failing an amicable settlement, French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
